name: Snack Cake Mix<master>
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir with a wire whisk until blended.
3. Divide mixture evenly into six 2 1/2 cup containers with tight-fitting lids.
4. Fill each container about 2 1/4 cups.
5. Seal the containers.
6. Label with date and contents.
7. Store in a cool, dry place.
8. Use within 10 to 12 weeks.
